mnemonics: Keep All Securely Positioned Ingredients Next
keyPoints: Layering: Divide data into packets, manage with headers, managed by protocol
TCP/IP: Transmission Control Protocol/Internet Protocol, manages data over IP network
OSI Model: 7 layers, from Physical to Application
Physical Layer: Transmission media, Guided Media, Unguided Media: Wireless
Guided Media: Cables, Fiber Optics, manage data speed and distance
Unguided Media: Wireless, Radio Waves, manage data speed and distance
